/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bank.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/AccountManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/BankAccount.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/InputValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/LoanManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/RDManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/StandingInstructionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bank.dir/src/NotificationService.cpp.o -o bank  /usr/lib64/libsqlite3.so
